overall.description: Cinematic nighttime view of a cyberpunk cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, showing an elevated highway interchange surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The camera slowly pans right across the scene while vehicles create light trails on the wet asphalt below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with holographic billboards

events.description: camera begins slow continuous pan to the right
multiple vehicles pass on the curved highway creating light trails

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the cyberpunk city intersection and traffic flow

entered.detail: Tall dark building with illuminated red spire and blue accent lighting
Multi-level highway interchange with wet reflective asphalt surface
Skyscraper featuring large vertical holographic billboards displaying animated advertisements
Tall residential tower with uniform grid of illuminated windows
Small commercial structures beneath the highway overpass with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: Opening view of a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection dominated by a curved elevated highway. A distinctive tower with a red spire stands on the left while holographic advertisements illuminate the center skyline. Sparse vehicle traffic creates light trails as the camera begins a slow rightward pan.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with neon-lit towers

events.description: view shifts to emphasize right side of intersection as left tower exits frame
holographic billboard cycles to new advertisement content showing different imagery

agents.ego_description: continuing stationary observation while panning across the neon cityscape

entered.detail: Vertical green and red neon signage running down the right tower facade
Building with warm yellow accent lighting visible on the far right edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right, revealing detailed neon signage on the right-side tower while the red-spired tower exits the frame. The holographic billboards cycle through advertisements, and the elevated highway remains central with continuous sparse traffic flow through the cyberpunk district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan across a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection that shifts its focus from a distant red spire to the detailed neon architecture of the city's core. It begins with a view of a curved elevated highway and a prominent tower with a red spire on the left, while holographic advertisements cast a glow over the center skyline. As the camera glides to the right, the red-spired tower gradually exits the frame, allowing the scene to expand toward a second tower adorned with intricate neon signage. The perspective then settles on the cycling holographic billboards and the steady flow of sparse traffic creating light trails on the wet asphalt below.
